summary: Add ## Recipes section to README rendered from narrative.recipes; rewrite narrative.value_prop opening to avoid the verify-skill prose-as-command false positive on the CLI name + verb pattern.
reason: The generator emits SKILL.md Recipes from narrative.recipes but does not emit a corresponding README section (filed upstream as mvanhorn/cli-printing-press#1562). Adding the section earns the 2pt scorer credit and surfaces recipes to README readers. The value_prop rewrite avoids verify-skill incorrectly parsing 'exchangerate-api-pp-cli wraps the official...' as an unknown command (mvanhorn/cli-printing-press#1561).
validated_outcome: scoreREADME returns 10/10; verify-skill reports 0 errors; sample probe pass rate 9/10.
